The '''mother''' of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] was the wife of the [[Journeyman Protector/Legends|Journeyman Protector]] of [[Concord Dawn/Legends|Concord Dawn]], [[Fett (Elder Journeyman Protector)|Fett]]. They had two children: a daughter, [[Arla Fett|Arla]], and a son, Jango. The mother, along with her husband, was killed by the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]. Before being killed, she saved her son's life by shooting a Death Watch soldier in the head, giving him a chance to escape. Soon after Jango was saved by a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]].<ref name="Jango Fett: Open Seasons 1" />
